summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Yu-Gi-Oh Card Creator app. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend functionality excellent with card creation, editing, collection management, and export/import features all operational.
passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/cards creates card (201 status)
Backend API: GET /api/cards returns cards list with total count
Backend API: GET /api/cards/:id returns single card
Backend API: PUT /api/cards/:id updates card
Backend API: DELETE /api/cards/:id deletes card
Backend API: GET /api/cards?name=test search functionality
Backend API: GET /api/cards/export/all exports all cards
Backend API: POST /api/cards/import imports multiple cards
Backend API: Xyz monster creation with rank field
Backend API: Link monster creation with link rating and arrows
Frontend: Card Editor page loads with form and canvas
Frontend: Card name input and auto-render functionality
Frontend: Card type dropdown with conditional field changes
Frontend: Conditional fields (Level/Rank/Link Rating/Spell-Trap type)
Frontend: ATK/DEF inputs for monsters
Frontend: Description textarea with auto-render
Frontend: Save functionality with database integration
Frontend: Collection page loads and displays cards
Frontend: Search functionality filters cards by name
Frontend: Filter panel with type/attribute/rarity filters
Frontend: PNG export downloads card image
Frontend: JSON export downloads card data
Frontend: Navigation between Editor and Collection tabs
Frontend: Card canvas rendering with proper Yu-Gi-Oh styling
Frontend: Dark theme with blue/teal/aqua color scheme
